use_cases: Secure user authentication with animated 3D canvas reveal effect for modern web applications
Onboarding flows with immersive visual experience using WebGL shader animations
Landing page sign-in sections with gradient overlays and smooth transitions
SaaS platform authentication with canvas-based decorative elements
E-commerce customer login with animated background effects
ai_summary: A modern sign-in flow component featuring an interactive 3D canvas reveal effect built with Three.js and WebGL shaders. The component uses a dot matrix animation with customizable colors, opacity levels, and animation speed to create immersive authentication experiences. Includes gradient overlays, smooth motion transitions via Framer Motion, and adapts to dark-themed interfaces with cyan accent colors.
